cross_scene_arcs.title: Healing Power and Physical Toll
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Coffey repeatedly uses his healing ability to help others, but each act causes him physical distress and empathetic suffering, culminating in the transfer of his power to Paul.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Possesses healing ability but unaware of its full implications.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Power transferred, Coffey deceased, with lasting effects on Paul.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ongoing burden of the power on Paul and the mystery of its origin.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Paul Edgecomb
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: From initial polite interaction, Coffey and Paul develop a deep trust through healing and shared experiences, leading to a protective relationship that endures beyond Coffey's death.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Executed but spiritually bonded to Paul.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Paul's immortality and the weight of outliving loved ones.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Response to Human Cruelty
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Wrongfully accused and sensitive to suffering, Coffey experiences empathetic distress and takes action against wrongdoers, ultimately choosing execution to escape the cruelty.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Accepts death as a release from worldly pain.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The injustice of his conviction and the moral ambiguity of his actions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict with Percy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Paul's conflict with Percy escalates from reprimanding misconduct during Coffey's intake to confronting deliberate sabotage during Del's botched execution.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Percy shows misconduct, and Paul establishes rules and reprimands him.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Percy sabotages the execution, forcing Paul to manage a horrific scene amid chaos.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Percy's resentment and potential for further misconduct remain unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with John Coffey
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Paul's bond with John Coffey deepens from initial intake and healing, through learning of Coffey's innocence via a vision, to ordering his execution after a final telepathic connection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Paul meets Coffey, shares a humanizing handshake, and establishes behavioral rules.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Paul orders Coffey's execution, burdened by guilt and the knowledge of his innocence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Paul's internal conflict over executing Coffey and his ongoing remorse.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Immortality and Guilt
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Paul discloses his traumatic past as a death row guard, reveals his immortality as a curse, mourns Elaine's death, and reflects on the burden of outliving loved ones.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Paul begins confiding in Elaine about his experiences on the Green Mile.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Paul is left immortal and alone, troubled by thoughts of death and loss.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Paul's curse of immortality and guilt over Coffey's execution persist.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escape and Disclosure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Paul escapes unnoticed from a location, taking a poncho, and later in life discloses his past experiences, including his time on death row, to Elaine.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Paul successfully escapes to outside, undetected.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Paul begins recounting his past to Elaine, deepening their friendship through shared secrets.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full story of his past, including escape and Green Mile events, remains partially untold.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defiance to Forced Transfer
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Percy repeatedly defies Paul's authority through assaults and demands for execution roles, leading to a coerced agreement and forced transfer after botching an execution.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Defiant guard on E Block, assaulting inmates and challenging superiors.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Forced to transfer to Briar Ridge after being punished for a botched execution.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Transfer is under duress, and his future at Briar Ridge is uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Acts of Cruelty Towards Inmates
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Percy commits deliberate acts of cruelty against inmates, including physical assaults, killing a pet mouse, and sabotaging an execution.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Uses violence and intimidation against inmates.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Deliberately causes a botched execution through sabotage.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Guards' anger and potential consequences for his malicious actions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Humiliation and Mental Collapse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Percy is publicly humiliated by an inmate, later becomes catatonic after a psychic encounter, and ends up permanently institutionalized at Briar Ridge.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Publicly humiliated guard, losing dignity and composure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Catatonic patient at Briar Ridge Mental Hospital.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: None, as he is permanently institutionalized.
